"not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"resource-id": "de.smartchord.droid:id/scroll", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "4b925a5", "children": [{"text": "This saving-screen enables you to retain personal smartChord settings such as chords, exercises, etc. for future reutilization.

Just press the saving button, assign a descreptive name like the title of the chords musicpiece and confirm with OK. Your chord has now been saved and listed by name.

For better retrieving you can sort the list in ascending or descending order by name or date pressing the sort button.

The magnifier will help you looking for a specific setting. According to your entry the list will be reduced to the listings corresponding to your sequence of letters.

Whenever you tested something and changed settings, restore your original saved setting by clicking the folder button. Use the delete button to remove saved settings The related entry will disappear.
